title: zornia diphylla var. latifolia
intro: Zornia diphylla var. latifolia, also known as Chiltepinillo or broad-leaved zornia, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is a shrub-like herb with medicinal properties that have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes, including as a treatment for fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and stems contain bioactive compounds that exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and fighting off infections. The leaves can be prepared as a tea, and the plant's extracts are also used in herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
